params.name: Tri-Lion Bronze Candlestick
params.description: This two-meter-tall masterpiece features three crouching lions with intricately carved muscles and flowing manes, their paws entwined with sacred flame motifs. A radiant symbol of power and light, forged in bronze with unparalleled craftsmanship.
